li.label: crude road built
li.description: A simple dirt path connects our people to the wider world.

li.label: crude road built
li.description: A simple dirt path connects our people to the wider world.

li.description: A simple dirt path connects our people to the wider world.

li.label: road built
li.description: A proper stone road strengthens our connections.

li.label: road built
li.description: A proper stone road strengthens our connections.

li.label: road built
li.description: A proper stone road strengthens our connections.

li.label: road built
li.description: A proper stone road strengthens our connections.

li.label: road built
li.description: A proper stone road strengthens our connections.

li.label: engineered route built
li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.label: engineered route built
li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.label: engineered route built
li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.label: engineered route built
li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.label: engineered route built
li.description: Asphalt, steel, and sweat — a modern route connects what was once distant.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: glittering route built
li.description: A gleaming road of plasteel and advanced components now binds civilization together. This is the peak of our craft.

li.label: no recent road built
li.description: Our settlements remain disconnected. We must build roads and railways.

li.label: terrible groundbreaking
li.description: The ceremony was an embarrassment. What should have been a celebration of progress was instead a shambles.

li.label: boring groundbreaking
li.description: The ceremony was uninspired. The shovel hit the dirt and that was about it.

li.label: good groundbreaking
li.description: The ceremony marked a fine beginning. The Surveyor's speech was inspiring and the work begins with purpose.

li.label: glorious groundbreaking
li.description: The ceremony was unforgettable. The Surveyor's words ignited a fire of purpose, and everyone left ready to reshape the world.

li.label: terrible opening of the line
li.description: The ceremony was a disaster. The supposed celebration of connection felt more like a funeral.

li.label: boring opening of the line
li.description: The ceremony was forgettable. A ribbon was cut and that was about it.

li.label: good opening of the line
li.description: The ceremony was a fine celebration. The new route opens with hope and opportunity.

li.label: glorious opening of the line
li.description: The ceremony was triumphant. Drinks flowed, stories were told, and everyone felt the weight of history in the new connection.
